Video.summary: Set at the scenic Troubadour Golf and Field Club in Nashville, TN, this exhibition match brings a mix of celebrity flair and friendly competition to the pickleball court. Olympian Shawn Johnson and her husband Andrew East take on TV host Jason Kennedy and pro Wes Burrows in a lighthearted yet tightly contested match that goes down to the wire. With Shawn still learning the ropes (and the rules), and Andrew channeling his athletic instincts, the duo puts up an impressive fight against the more experienced Kennedy and Burrows. It’s a fast-paced, fun-filled match full of laughs, learning moments, and great rallies—perfect for fans of lifestyle sports and celebrity matchups.
Video.title: Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows

Image.alt: Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows

Video.summary: It's Super Sunday on Day 3 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Game Number Five pits the Chennai Super Champs against the Delhi team (Dilwale) at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The stakes are incredibly high as teams battle for the final semi-final spots.The action starts with the First Mixed Doubles match, featuring Chennai's coach, the legendary pro Joey Farias, teaming up with Anna Clarice. They face the formidable duo of Delhi's Willie Chung and Lauren Mercado. The match is a tactical masterclass, with Willie Chung noted for his consistent, pro-level reset game and Farias praised for his on-court intelligence.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1

Video.summary: It's the "Southern Derby" in the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Bengaluru takes on Chennai in the second tie of the day, live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The match features 48 players from six teams and 14 countries, with commentators detailing every crucial point.The tie begins with a thrilling Men's Singles match: Bengaluru's Blaskowitz (a Croatian talent) faces Chennai's Sobek (the Polish national champion). The commentators highlight the extreme patience and dinking skills demonstrated by both players, with Sobek's ability to keep the ball low being a key factor.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Video.summary: Jack Munro of Texas faces Virginia’s David Bieger in the 2024 DUPR National Championship Men’s Singles Final, showcasing skill, power, and precision in elite collegiate pickleball.
Video.title: Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas

Image.alt: Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas
Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas
Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas

Video.summary: Beth Bellamy & Yates Johnson compete with Megan Fudge & Paul Olin in a Bronze medal match
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach, this Week 3, Day 2 matchup of the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 features Liberty University facing Carnegie Mellon University. Liberty enters the match strong, having already secured wins in women's doubles. The broadcast highlights the Men's Doubles game where Liberty's Derek Kraje and Ben Rice dominate with a 11-6 victory, utilizing aggressive net play and strategic resets.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon

Video.summary: Indiana’s Safdar faces Clemson’s Bozzetto in the 2024 DUPR National Championship Women’s Singles Final, battling for collegiate pickleball supremacy in a best-of-three format.
Video.title: Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson

Image.alt: Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson
Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson
Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson

Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - January 3 2023 - All Stars Mixed Doubles

November 7, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: The high-stakes action continues on Day 9 with the Second Semi-Final of the World Pickleball League (WPBL), featuring Pune United against Mumbai Pickle Power. The air is thick with anticipation, especially with the major news that Mumbai's star player, Brandon Lane, may not be available for the matchup.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a high-stakes Tie 5 showdown. Pune United enters the arena hungry for their first points of the season, facing off against a confident Hyderabad Superstars squad coming off a fresh victory. Watch as top-tier athletes like Katie Morris, Shawn Mendes, and William Sobeck battle through a gauntlet of Women’s Singles, Mixed Doubles, and Men’s Doubles matches. With "hands battles" at the net and strategic "pickle plays" in full effect, every point is a testament to the speed and precision of professional pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

US Open Pickleball Championships 2018 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold

Video.summary: Sarah Mitten and Mary Helen Atkins take on Lily Kordic and Kara Williams in this Women's Senior Pro Semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: The DUPR Collegiate National Championship concludes with a thrilling Women's Doubles showdown as the University of Virginia (UVA) takes on Utah Tech. Watch UVA's Alexander McDonald battle Utah Tech's Cammy Bliss and Avery Beck in a high-stakes, best-of-three match.
Video.title: Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech

Image.alt: Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech
Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech
Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: Rob Nunnery & Ryler Deheart faced off against Hunter Johnson & Yates Johnson in a quarterfinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

Video.summary: At the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, Tina Pisnik and Tammy Emmrich square off against Alix Truong and Milan Rane in the Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal match. Expect aggressive shot-making, quick court coverage, and intense chemistry on both sides as these athletes leave it all on the court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 returns to the Jio World Garden in Mumbai for an electrifying Tie 8 showdown. The defending champions, Bengaluru Jawans—led by coach Oliver Strecker and backed by owners Atlee and Priya—return to the court for the first time since their dominant opening night performance. They face a determined Delhi Dilwale squad, coached by Wesley Gabrielsson, who are looking to climb the standings after a hard-fought tie-break victory in their previous outing.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2

Video.summary: The high-stakes action of Day 7 in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) features a decisive matchup between Pune United and the Delhi Dilwale. With the semi-final race tightening, both teams are fighting fiercely for vital points.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2

Video.summary: The Coachella Valley Scorpions face off against the Denver Iconics in a mixed team match.
Video.title: NPL - Scorpions vs Iconics (Mixed)

Image.alt: NPL - Scorpions vs Iconics (Mixed)
NPL - Scorpions vs Iconics (Mixed)
NPL - Scorpions vs Iconics (Mixed)

Video.summary: Welcome to Championship Sunday at the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This Round of 16 Collegiate Team Match pits the 5th-seeded Utah Tech against the 12th-seeded, but formidable, Utah State squad. The action takes place at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah. Both teams are competing for a coveted bid to the National Championship in Saint Louis, Missouri, which features a $30,000 prize pool.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach, this Round of 16 matchup from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 features Penn State battling Liberty University for a spot in the quarterfinals. With a bid to the National Championship on the line, the stakes are incredibly high in this win-or-go-home match.The contest goes the distance, pushing both teams to their limits. After splitting the initial six games 3-3, the match culminates in a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7). Watch standout performances from Liberty's John McCutcheon and Anneliese Brielle, who fight to keep their team alive, and Penn State's Caitlin Hartman and Theodore De Sousa, who deliver clutch plays under pressure.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty

Video.summary: Sherri Dion & Michael Dion vs. Kristen Welch & David Hartzell for the Mixed Doubles Skill 3.5 Age 50+
Video.title: Pickleball - Mixed Doubles Skill 3.5 Age 50+

Image.alt: Pickleball - Mixed Doubles Skill 3.5 Age 50+
Pickleball - Mixed Doubles Skill 3.5 Age 50+
Pickleball - Mixed Doubles Skill 3.5 Age 50+

Video.summary: Experience the electric intensity of the "Maharashtra derby" as local rivals Pune United and Mumbai Pickle Power clash at the Jio World Garden in a match hailed as one of the season's best. Mumbai ignites the home crowd with a dominant early lead, fueled by Jada Bui’s emotional victory over a "fearful" Katie Morris and a clinical masterclass from Brandon and Glauca Carvajal Lane in mixed doubles. However, the tide turns in a dramatic "tale of two halves" as Pune United mounts a stunning comeback. Witness the high-power precision of Bolin Bako as he derails Max Green’s momentum, sparking a relentless surge that sees Pune sweep the final three matches to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat. This tie is a masterclass in team resilience and tactical pressure under the lights in Mumbai.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2

Video.summary: Witness a high-stakes showdown on the final day of league competition as the undefeated Chennai Super Champs face off against a determined Pune United squad in a battle for postseason momentum. The atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden is electric, featuring a "lip-smacking" women's singles battle between European stars Katie Morris and Dominika Turkovic. As Pune fights to stay alive in the tie, coach Rusty Sobeck looks for a breakthrough in a tactical mixed doubles clash against Jonny Goldberg’s top-tier rotation. From "stunning singles fight backs" to a strategic masterclass in doubles positioning, this tie showcases the intense grit required to challenge the league's only unbeaten titan.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1

Video.summary: Experience the final showdown of the league stages as Delhi Dilwale and the Rajasthan Titans clash in a high-stakes battle for pride and final positioning. The atmosphere is electric as Rajasthan’s Lorena Dupnik delivers a "professional performance" in a come-from-behind singles victory against Delhi’s Mehek Kuan, setting a fierce tone for the tie. Witness a tactical masterclass in mixed doubles featuring the relentless power of Max Mantor and the "next level" skills of Trang Huynh as they attempt to dismantle the Titans’ defensive wall. With veteran Rob Cassidy making his highly anticipated men's doubles debut, every rally becomes a desperate fight for dominance in the season's final league encounter.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Rajasthan - Day 11 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Rajasthan - Day 11 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Rajasthan - Day 11 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Rajasthan - Day 11 Tie 2

Video.summary: The stakes reach their absolute peak at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden for the first semifinal of the World Pickleball League Season 2, where there are "no do overs" for the Chennai Super Champs and Pune United. Witness a high-stakes tactical chess match as Chennai’s coach Jonny Goldberg makes the bold move to start premier player Rika Fujiwara against the "big and aggressive" Katie Morris in a critical women's singles clash. The intensity continues with a masterclass in mixed doubles featuring the powerful pairing of Lee Hwang Nam and Carlota Trevino facing off against Pune's consistent stars, William Sobeck and Magdalena Gregorio. Every point is a desperate grind for survival as these two titans battle through "world class" rallies for a guaranteed spot in the grand finale.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1

Video.summary: The road to the championship reaches a fever pitch at Mumbai's Jio World Garden for the second semifinal of the World Pickleball League Season 2. In this high-stakes "penultimate tie," the defending champion Bengaluru Jawans face off against a hungry Delhi Dilwale squad led by coach Wesley Gabrielsson. Witness a clash of styles as the dominant Katerina Stewart, who has lost only one match all season, battles the passionate Alejandra Lopez in a critical women's singles opener. Tactical brilliance is on full display as Max Mantor and Trang Huynh attempt to dismantle the Jawans' defense in a high-scoring mixed doubles "exhibition". With every strategic "Pickle Play" and intense baseline rally potentially deciding who advances to the grand finale, the atmosphere is electric and the margins for error are razor-thin.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2

Video.summary: The grand finale of the World Pickleball League Season 2 descends upon Mumbai’s Jio World Garden for an unforgettable clash of titans between the Chennai Super Champs and Delhi Dilwale. Witness the technical mastery of Rika Fujiwara as she faces off against Alejandra Lopez in a high-stakes women’s singles match that sets the tone for the entire championship. The intensity reaches a fever pitch during a mixed doubles "masterclass" featuring Max Mansoor and Trang Huynh, which commentators hailed as the potential "rally of the season". With the "Band of Honor" and the ultimate league trophy on the line, every strategic "Pickle Play" and nerve-wracking volley contributes to an atmosphere so electric the crowd and commentators alike are left "going berserk".
Video.title: WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1
